doc: Pure-TS port of GMP mpn_rshift: shift the n-limb non-negative integer s right by count bits (little-endian limb order). Returns the n-limb shifted result plus the count bits that fell off the bottom, packed into the HIGH count bits of an mp_limb_t (the rest of the return is zero). Symmetric to mpn_lshift. Substrate-class -- raw bigint arrays, no core.ts import. Precondition: n >= 1, 1 <= count <= 63. count=0 is undefined behavior in GMP and a domain error here.
c_signature: mp_limb_t mpn_rshift(mp_limb_t *rp, const mp_limb_t *sp, mp_size_t n, unsigned int count)
refs: GMP manual §8.3 (Low-level Functions): right shift across n limbs.
mpfr/src/div.c, mpfr/src/get_str.c -- canonical MPFR callers (mantissa right-shift for normalisation and base conversion).
